---
title: "Spring Semester Goals"
author: "Annabel Coxon"
date: "2006-03-04"
categories: [goals, daily-entries]
description: "Spring 2026 Goals"
image: ""
---



Spring 2026 goals


1. ~~Charles Center Proposal~~

2. Set up digital notebook

3. Kinetoplastid taxonomy spreadsheet

4. Practice microscopy and cell extraction

5. Build works cited page
